models.description: Financial sentiment analysis model built on BERT, classifying text as positive, negative, or neutral.
RoBERTa model fine-tuned on ~124M tweets for sentiment analysis (positive/negative/neutral).
RoBERTa model fine-tuned for Indonesian part-of-speech tagging.
BERT model fine-tuned on CoNLL-2003 for named entity recognition (PER, ORG, LOC, MISC).
BERT-large model fine-tuned on CoNLL-2003 for English named entity recognition.
Multilingual BERT model for named entity recognition across 9 languages.
RoBERTa-base fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 for extractive question answering.
BERT-large with whole word masking, fine-tuned on SQuAD for question answering.
BERT-large with whole word masking, fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 for question answering.
Compact RoBERTa model fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 for lightweight question answering.
Lightweight sentence embedding model mapping text to 384-dim dense vectors.
Multilingual sentence embedding model supporting 50+ languages, 384-dim output.
Compact English text embedding model (33M params) for retrieval and ranking.
General-purpose English text embedding model (110M params) for retrieval and ranking.
Lightweight sentence embedding model optimized for semantic similarity tasks.
Multilingual model for cross-lingual semantic similarity across 50+ languages.
Multilingual MPNet model for high-quality semantic similarity across 50+ languages.
Compact English embedding model optimized for semantic similarity and matching.
High-capacity English text embedding model (335M params) for semantic similarity.
General-purpose English embedding model optimized for semantic similarity.
Vision Transformer (ViT) pre-trained on ImageNet-21k, fine-tuned on ImageNet-1k at 224x224.
ViT model fine-tuned for gender classification from facial images.
Swin Transformer large model for image classification at 224x224 resolution.
DETR-based model for detecting tables in document images.
SegFormer-B2 fine-tuned for clothing segmentation in fashion images.
SegFormer-B5 (largest variant) fine-tuned on ADE20K for semantic segmentation at 640x640.
SegFormer-B1 fine-tuned on ADE20K for semantic segmentation at 512x512.
SegFormer-B2 fine-tuned on ADE20K for semantic segmentation at 512x512.
Classic ResNet-50 model pre-trained on ImageNet-1k for image classification.
Multilingual BERT (104 languages) for general-purpose text embeddings.
BERT-base fine-tuned on MRPC paraphrase corpus for text embedding extraction.
BERT-base fine-tuned on MRPC for paraphrase detection and text classification.
CLIP ViT-B/16 model for joint image-text embeddings with 16x16 patch size.
CLIP ViT-B/32 model for joint image-text embeddings with 32x32 patch size.
ConvNeXt-Tiny model combining CNN efficiency with Transformer-era design for image classification.
